testScenario: Audit all local data storage and runtime surfaces to confirm no plaintext sensitive data (pickup codes, notification content, phone numbers) persists anywhere accessible.

auditItems.name: Room 数据库无明文 (Room database — no plaintext)
auditItems.description: Pickup codes and notification content stored in Room must be encrypted, not plaintext.
auditItems.method: adb shell run-as <package> sqlite3 databases/*.db 'SELECT * FROM parcels;' | inspect for plaintext codes
auditItems.expected: No plaintext pickup codes or notification content in any Room table.

auditItems.name: SharedPreferences 无明文 (SharedPrefs — no plaintext)
auditItems.description: SharedPreferences files must not contain plaintext sensitive data.
auditItems.expected: No plaintext codes, tokens, or PII in any SharedPrefs XML.

auditItems.name: 日志无敏感数据 (Logcat — no sensitive data)
auditItems.description: Application logs must never print pickup codes, notification content, or phone numbers.
auditItems.expected: No sensitive values appear in logcat output.

auditItems.name: 截图无敏感数据 (Screenshots — no sensitive data)
auditItems.description: Captured screenshots must redact or mask pickup codes.
auditItems.method: Visually inspect all collected screenshots; verify codes are masked.

auditItems.name: 剪贴板无敏感数据 (Clipboard — no sensitive data)
auditItems.description: App must not copy raw pickup codes to the system clipboard without masking/auto-clear.
auditItems.method: Trigger copy action, inspect `adb shell cmd clipboard`.
auditItems.expected: Clipboard either empty, masked, or auto-cleared after short delay.

auditItems.name: 崩溃日志无敏感数据 (Crash logs — no sensitive data)
auditItems.description: Crash stacktraces and tombstones must not contain sensitive data in fields/locals.
auditItems.method: Trigger/inspect crash logs: adb logcat -d *:E; check dropbox.
auditItems.expected: No sensitive data in crash output.

auditItems.name: 备份未开启 (Backup disabled)
auditItems.description: android:allowBackup must be false; no cloud/auto backup of app data.
auditItems.method: Confirm manifest allowBackup=false (see manifest-audit.json); check `adb shell bmgr`.
auditItems.expected: Backup disabled; no data exported to backup transport.

auditItems.name: 允许明文流量=false (Cleartext traffic disabled)
auditItems.description: usesCleartextTraffic must be false; no plaintext network (N/A offline, but verify flag).

auditItems.name: 数据目录权限 (Data directory permissions)
auditItems.description: App private data directory must have restrictive permissions (0700).
auditItems.expected: Directory and files not world/group readable.

auditItems.name: ContentProvider 未导出 (ContentProvider not exported)
auditItems.description: No ContentProvider should be exported to other apps.
auditItems.expected: No exported ContentProviders exposing sensitive data.

auditItems.name: 文件存储加密 (File storage encrypted)
auditItems.description: Files written to external/cache storage must be encrypted or not contain sensitive data.
auditItems.method: adb shell run-as <package> find files cache -type f -exec cat {} \;
auditItems.expected: No plaintext sensitive data in files or cache.

auditItems.name: 临时文件清理 (Temp file cleanup)
auditItems.description: Temporary files created during processing must be cleaned up after use.
auditItems.method: Trigger operations, then inspect cache/temp dirs for leftover sensitive files.
auditItems.expected: No leftover temp files containing sensitive data.

_meta.description: Sensitive-data audit template with 12 checks covering Room, SharedPrefs, logcat, screenshots, clipboard, crash logs, backup, cleartext traffic, directory permissions, ContentProviders, file storage, and temp files.
_meta.redactionPolicy: Store only hashes of sensitive values in evidence fields. Never paste real pickup codes or notification text.
